blockers_fixed.Traditional_vs_Simplified_Chinese_topic: REQUIRED_TOPIC + REQUIRED_TOPIC_ALIASES supports both Simplified and Traditional
blockers_fixed.law_reference_filename_only_search: Changed to content-based search (reads .md/.txt law files, not filenames)
blockers_fixed.English_only_constraint_search: R030_CONSTRAINT_GROUPS with bilingual terms; any match in group passes
blockers_fixed.Windows_CP950_stdout_crash: setup_stdout_encoding() reconfigures stdout/stderr to utf-8 with errors=replace

fix_details.topic_check: REQUIRED_TOPIC='决策前检查清单' with REQUIRED_TOPIC_ALIASES=['決策前檢查清單']. Still rejects arbitrary topics.
fix_details.law_references: check_governance_law_references now reads file content (utf-8) and searches for refs in combined text, not filenames.
fix_details.constraint_search: 10 constraint groups defined each with English + Chinese terms. Any term match = constraint documented.
fix_details.cp950_safe: sys.stdout/sys.stderr reconfigure to utf-8 errors=replace at main() start.
